name: authenticateEmployee
description: Verify the employee by checking their Employee ID and email against the employee database. Call this after the user provides both. Returns success:true with employee details on match, or success:false with a partial_match field ('employee_id', 'email', or 'none') to guide the error message.

employee_id.description: Employee ID provided by the user, e.g. EMP008

email.description: Email address provided by the user
